'''jaluchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnon|pycnon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnon|pycnon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jaluchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || jælichith || jælichij || jælichish || jælichi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || jaluluchuth || jaluluchuj || jaluluchush || jaluluchu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || jaluchuth || jaluchuj || jaluchush || jaluchu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || jalufchufth || jalufchufj || jalufchufsh || jalufchuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || jaluchuthu || jaluchuju || jaluchushu || jaluchuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || jaluchuth || jaluchuj || jaluchush || jaluchu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || jaluchuthul || jaluchujul || jaluchushul || jaluchukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || jaluchuuthuthu || jaluchuujuju || jaluchuushushu || jaluchuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || jaluchuthun || jaluchujun || jaluchushun || jaluchukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || jaluchuthuoro || jaluchujuoro || jaluchushuoro || jaluchukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
